phase1.name: Squeekys Car Wash Zephyrhills
phase1.google_subtypes: Car wash, Car dealer, Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Squeekys Car Wash in Zephyrhills is a touchless, brushless automated car wash located at 5542 Gall Blvd, serving the community with consistently excellent results. With a 4.6-star rating from over 1,000 customer reviews, the facility offers four wash packages ranging from the Basic wash at $10 to the Supreme package at $25, each including spot-free rinse, undercarriage wash, and tire cleaning. For those seeking convenience, unlimited membership plans start at $23.99 per month for the Basic tier, allowing customers to wash as often as they'd like.

Beyond the wash tunnel, Squeekys provides comprehensive amenities including free vacuuming, mat cleaning, tire shine, towel service, and ceramic coating options. Higher-tier packages add protective treatments like carnauba hot wax, ceramic seal, rain repel, and graphene paint protection. The Zephyrhills location operates seven days a week from 8 AM to 7:30 PM, making it easy to fit a car wash into your schedule. Mobile pay is available for added convenience, and customers can join the membership program to maximize savings on regular washes.

phase1.name: Hoffman Car Wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Car wash, Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Hoffman Car Wash operates a network of 29 locations offering monthly unlimited wash club memberships with tiered service packages ranging from basic Exterior ($29.99/month) to premium Signature with Interior Cleaning ($69.99/month). All packages feature touch-free drying technology combined with soft touch washing. The membership options include annual billing options at slightly reduced rates, providing customers flexibility in payment preferences. Members can wash at all 29 locations and enjoy benefits like undercarriage washing, wheel cleaning, tire shine, hot wax application, and advanced protective coatings including Carbonite and Ceramic Shield & Shine.

The service tiers accommodate various customer needs, from basic exterior cleaning to comprehensive packages that include interior detailing with carpet vacuuming, vinyl and plastic surface cleaning, door jamb cleaning, interior glass cleaning, and towel drying. Higher-tier packages include premium protective treatments such as Vision Clear for windows and Ceramic Shield & Shine for paint protection. Hoffman Car Wash also offers additional services including express detail packages, a fleet program for commercial customers, and an online shop. The company demonstrates community commitment through programs like food drives, veteran appreciation on Veterans Day, supporting Breakthrough T1D diabetes organization, and American Red Cross fundraising initiatives through the Helping Hands program.

Beyond the automatic bay, the location offers self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on control, plus Premium Vacuum Stations equipped with powerful suction and tire inflator features at no extra charge. A high pressure undercarriage rinse is available to address salt and debris buildup.

The Wash Club Membership provides unlimited washes on a monthly basis and can be accessed via an RFID tag installed at the location. Call during the facility's 24-hour operation, or download the Clean Machine app to manage your account and access membership options.

phase1.name: Scrub Co Car Wash

phase1.description:
Scrub Co. Car Wash's Catskill location is a comprehensive car and pet washing facility situated at 8 Boulevard Ave, Catskill, NY 12414. Open 7 days a week, the location features 2 automatic washers, 4 self-serve bays, 9 vacuum stations, and a 24-hour dog wash station, making it a versatile one-stop-shop for vehicle and pet care. The facility can accommodate trucks up to 13 feet tall, providing additional convenience for larger vehicles.

The Catskill location offers four tiered car wash packages with progressive features and pricing. The Standard package ($12) includes wash and dry. The Deluxe package ($15) adds underbody wash, wheel blaster, and foam polish. The Premium package ($20) includes all Deluxe features plus hot wax and shine and tire shine. The top-tier Ceramic package ($25) incorporates ceramic coating along with all Premium features. Credit card purchases are subject to New York State sales tax.

Scrub Co. operates a mobile app-based loyalty rewards program that allows customers to earn free washes, claim deals and discounts, purchase wash bundles, gift washes to others, and receive a complimentary wash on their birthday. The app also provides location information and enables customers to manage their car wash transactions digitally.

The facility's 14-foot-high bays accommodate semi tractors and oversized vehicles like RVs, travel trailers, pontoon boats, ATVs, and ice castles—a practical setup for people returning from trips up north along I35. The three vacuum stations mean you won't wait to clean interior debris from your car or truck after washing.

Located at the Wyoming exit off I35 on Viking Boulevard, the business sits in a convenient position for travelers heading back from northern Minnesota destinations. The facility is open every day from 8am to 8pm, though operations pause when temperatures drop to or below zero degrees Fahrenheit. Whether you need an automatic touchless wash or prefer to handle the spray yourself in one of the self-service bays, Wyoming Car Wash delivers both options at a single location. Call (612) 877-2179 or visit during posted hours to access the facility.

Hometown Auto Spa in Hokendauqua, Pennsylvania operates a touchless automatic system available 24 hours daily, seven days a week, with three named wash packages: The Hometown Spa Package, The Hometown Deluxe, and The Hometown Express. The business distinguishes itself with the Hot Wax Wave add-on, the only feature of its kind available locally. Customers consistently praise the premium soap quality and have rated the facility 4.4 stars across 319 reviews, citing clean facilities and a fast automatic wash process.

Beyond the automated bays, Hometown Auto Spa includes self-serve bays equipped with high-pressure manual washing, newly installed vacuum stations for interior cleaning, and a dedicated self-serve pet wash station with fencing for safety—a resource that receives excellent customer feedback. The pet spa allows owners to wash their dogs on-site, while the tire cleaner option is available during self-serve sessions. Mobile pay is accepted, and free vacuums are included with all visits. The business also supports local community events and causes as an active Whitehall-area sponsor.

Whether you choose an automated package or prefer hands-on control in the self-serve bays, the facility's combination of touchless technology, premium soaps, and specialized amenities accommodates multiple car washing preferences. The business is located at 3318 7th Street in Hokendauqua and is open around the clock every day of the week.

phase1.name: Baywash Auto Wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Car wash, Convenience store, Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Baywash Auto Wash in Bethalto, IL operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week at 426 W Bethalto Dr, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. The business has operated for over 30 years and recently renovated its location with new equipment designed to deliver customizable wash options—customers can choose between a touchless wash or a soft touch wash using SofTecs® closed cell foam brushes that minimize scratching. Individual washes start at $10 and include complimentary vacuum use, with four standard wash levels available at each visit.

Baywash's touchless option uses 28 zero degree turbo nozzles mounted on a contoured boom system, paired with heated water between 100–130 degrees and a water softening system that reduces hardness below 17ppm. The soft touch alternative employs environment-friendly detergents and the patented SofTecs® closed cell foam material designed to clean without transferring dirt. Both wash types incorporate low and high pH presoaks to address oils, grease, and organic buildup on your vehicle.

The Baywash Washbook loyalty program offers a buy-four-get-one-free punch card, and the business accepts mobile pay for added convenience. An unlimited wash club membership is also available for frequent customers. Call (800) 580-8827 during operating hours to ask about membership pricing, or visit the location anytime—it's open around the clock.

phase1.description:
Elephant Car Wash in Covington, WA operates as a touchless, brushless automated facility open 24 hours every day of the week at 27240 168th Pl SE. The business uses high-pressure water systems and specially formulated detergents to clean vehicles without brush contact, and applies wax and sealant treatments as specialty options. Beyond the automated tunnel, Elephant Car Wash offers Express Wash and Self-Serve options, with free vacuums available for customer use.

The Covington location accepts Visa and Mastercard for single washes and supports automatic billing for its membership program, which includes monthly plans, annual plans, and a family plan option. An unlimited wash club membership is available for customers seeking regular service. Elephant Car Wash has operated for 75 years and uses LPR and RFID readers to process memberships and payments efficiently. The business maintains eco-friendly operations across its locations.

With a 3.3-star rating based on 680 customer reviews, Elephant Car Wash reflects mixed customer experiences at this established regional chain. Visit the Covington location anytime since it's open 24/7, or call ahead to ask about membership options that fit your washing frequency.

phase1.description: Baywash Auto Wash in Jerseyville, Illinois operates a touchless and soft-touch automated system using SofTecs® closed cell foam brushes paired with 28 zero degree turbo nozzles on a contoured boom to target dirt without friction transfer. The facility heats water between 100–130 degrees and softens it below 17ppm, removing minerals so only dirt particles wash away, while low and high pH presoaks address oils, grease, and organic buildup. Individual washes start at $10 and let customers choose between touchless or soft-touch methods depending on their vehicle's needs. A Baywash Washbook loyalty program offers a buy-4-get-1-free punch card for repeat visitors. The location includes free vacuums and an unlimited wash club membership option. phase1.name: A C Touchless Car Wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Self service car wash
phase1.description:
A C Touchless Car Wash is a self-service facility located in Frankston, TX at 709 N Garrison St #701 that specializes in automated touchless vehicle cleaning. The facility features cutting-edge technology including foam cannons and high-pressure rinsing systems designed to deliver a meticulous finish without any contact with the vehicle's surface. The operation offers multiple wash packages, including a deluxe option that features a wax finish, providing customers with flexible choices for their vehicle maintenance needs. The facility emphasizes eco-friendly practices and convenient self-service operations that allow customers to avoid long lines.

Customer feedback consistently highlights the quality and effectiveness of the touchless system, with patrons reporting exceptional cleaning results and vehicles looking "brand new" after washing. The automated system is described as user-friendly and straightforward to operate, with various wash settings available to accommodate different cleaning needs. While reviews praise the foam soap effectiveness and overall service quality, some customers noted minor areas for improvement, including more efficient drying features and more powerful vacuum stations. The facility maintains well-maintained equipment and offers reasonable pricing for the services provided.

customer_reviews.review: Just had a great experience at this car wash! Quick and easy process. My car looks fabulous now!

I recently discovered this self-service car wash, and let me tell you, I'm impressed! I love that I can wash my car whenever I want, without having to deal with long lines. The automated system is straightforward and user-friendly, and I appreciate the variety of wash settings available. My favorite aspect is the foam soap; it does such a great job at lifting dirt and grime. I did notice a minor issue with the drying feature, though—it could be a bit more efficient. I ended up having to towel dry a few spots myself, but that's a small price to pay for the convenience. Overall, it's a fantastic spot to keep your vehicle looking sharp, and I will be returning for sure!

What a gem of a car wash! I visited on a Saturday morning and was pleasantly surprised by how clean and well-organized everything was. The touchless feature was definitely a highlight for me. My car had muddy spots from a recent road trip, and I was worried they wouldn't come off. To my delight, the wash did an exceptional job, and it looked pristine afterward! I also loved that they offered a variety of options at reasonable prices. One thing I wish they could improve on is having some sort of waiting area or seating, as I had to stand while waiting for my car to finish. However, the experience was so positive overall that I'll overlook that minor detail. Definitely a great place for anyone looking for a high-quality wash!

I can't say enough good things about this car wash! The touchless system is incredible; it left my car sparkling clean without any scratches or swirls. I was a bit apprehensive when I first drove in, but the whole process was super easy and intuitive. The equipment was well-maintained, and I could tell they take pride in their service. The wash options were clear, and I opted for the deluxe package, which included a wax finish. Wow, my car looked brand new! The only minor hiccup was that I felt the vacuum stations could have been a bit more powerful. But overall, this place exceeded my expectations. I will definitely be back regularly to keep my car looking its best. Highly recommend it to anyone who loves a clean ride without the hassle of traditional washes!

The facility offers four wash tiers: the Wash package with high-pressure cleaning and spot-free rinse, the Clean package adding underbody cleaning, the Protect package with protective coating and wheel cleaning, and the VIP Protect & Shine package featuring triple foam, wheel cleaning, and dual protective coatings. Bubble Bath Car & Dog Wash is a premier self-serve and automated car wash facility located in St. George, Utah at 538 South 1990 East. The business offers three distinct car washing options: Soft Touch Express Wash (brush-based automatic wash that minimizes micro-scratches), Touchless Typhoon Wash (fully automated touchless system that adjusts to any vehicle size and cleans the undercarriage without brushes), and traditional Self Serve bays where customers can control the cleaning process themselves using professional-grade chemicals and spray equipment. All bays are equipped with vacuums, glass cleaners, and armor sponges for detailing.

In addition to car wash services, Bubble Bath operates a self-serve dog wash facility with specialized amenities including veterinary-recommended tear-free shampoo, conditioner, pet deodorizer, warm water, vacuum stations, and professional dryers. Customers receive waterproof aprons for protection and their dogs receive a finishing treat. The facility is open 24/7 with an attendant on hand during business hours to assist customers with questions and equipment operation. All cleaning products are non-toxic, and the business emphasizes cleanliness and maintenance, with regular upkeep of bays and grounds, bright lighting for nighttime use, and fully functional equipment throughout the facility.

customer_reviews.text: I've been searching for a reliable self-service car wash, and I have to say, I'm pretty impressed with this one! The setup is straightforward, and I appreciate the ample space to maneuver my truck. I opted for the foam brush option, which was great for tackling those stubborn spots. The water pressure was fantastic, and I really liked that they had a variety of cleaning supplies available. It made it easy to customize my wash to my needs. The only downside I noticed was that some of the machines seemed to take a bit longer than expected—perhaps they could upgrade a few of them for better efficiency. Still, the overall value and experience made it worthwhile. I'll keep coming back for sure!

This self-service car wash exceeded my expectations! As someone who loves keeping my car in top shape, I was delighted with how clean everything was upon arrival. The equipment was well-maintained, and I felt like I had a myriad of options at my disposal. The vacuums were powerful, and I appreciated having access to microfiber towels for that finishing touch. I was particularly impressed by the eco-friendly cleaning products they offered; it's nice to see a business prioritizing sustainability. If I had to give any feedback, I'd suggest adding more signage for first-timers to navigate the station more easily. Overall, an excellent spot that I will recommend to friends and family!

I had a fantastic experience at this car wash! The self-service stations were clean and well-maintained, which made the whole process super easy. I loved the variety of options available; I was able to get my SUV sparkling clean without any hassle. The pressure washers worked perfectly, and I appreciate how everything felt user-friendly. I will definitely be back to keep my car looking great! My only suggestion would be to add a few more vacuum stations, as they were a bit busy during my visit. Overall, a great place for a quick clean-up!

unique_selling_points: Tailored for both personal vehicles and recreational vehicles

phase1.description:
Rocky Mountain Car Wash in Douglas, Wyoming has been serving the community since 2011 with both touchless automatic and self-serve washing options. The Douglas location features spacious self-serve bays with 14-foot clearance designed to accommodate oversized vehicles including RVs, semi-trucks, boats, and trailers, as well as touch-free automatic bays that can fit dually trucks. The facility operates 24/7 with well-lit bays for nighttime washing, and recently upgraded to offer free vacuums for all customers. Staff is on-site daily from 8am-5pm during winter and 8am-7pm during summer months.

The facility offers four wash tiers through both monthly membership and single-wash options. Membership plans range from the Good Wash at $19.95/month to the Ceramic Supernova Wash at $55.95/month, with single washes priced from $12 to $23. All wash packages include features such as undercarriage blast, pre-soak, tire cleaner, rocker blasters, high pressure rinse, spot-free rinse, and dryers. The Supernova and Best Wash tiers include ceramic or clear coat polish and foaming wax. Monthly memberships are managed through the EverWash app and allow customers to wash once daily, though app download and credit card payment are required. The location is situated at 801 S. 4th Street in Douglas, a community south of Casper known for outdoor recreation and ties to the oil, gas, and mining industries.

phase1.name: Antler Car wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Antler Car Wash in Kerrville, Texas operates a touchless automatic wash system paired with four self-serve bays, giving you two distinct ways to clean your vehicle. The touchless automatic equipment uses controlled pressure, heat, and chemistry to deliver a scratch-free clean without brushes, while the self-serve bays include a foam brush, high-pressure rinse, and clear-coat wax available for customers who prefer hands-on control. Under the canopy, high-powered self-service vacuums handle interior work on mats, seats, and cargo areas with clear instructions posted on-site.

The facility employs next-generation cleaning chemicals and premium protectants—including a spot-free rinse system and water beading sealant—designed to bring out lasting shine on modern paint, wraps, and coated finishes. Payment is straightforward through the on-screen kiosk system, which accepts debit and credit cards, tap-to-pay mobile wallets, and cash. Customers have reported zero swirl marks from the touchless wash, strong vacuum performance, and reliable equipment throughout.

Located at 3950 TX-534 Loop, Antler Car Wash is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and maintains a 4.0-star rating. Fleet accounts are welcome. Call or text 830-460-6211 to ask about services, or stop by during your preferred time to experience the combination of automated and self-serve options.

According to the business's own tagline, "When your car needs a scrub, don't just bring it to any car wash. Give it a clean that lasts from White Horse Car Wash."

Beyond automated washes, White Horse offers 24/7 self-serve bays with Innovative Control Systems equipment accepting cash, quarters, and credit cards. The facility also provides professional detailing, interior cleaning, carpet and upholstery shampooing, pet wash services, free vacuums, air freshener, and mat cleaning. phase1.description:
ScrubaDub Car Wash in Salem, NH operates as "Clean, Fast, Fun Since 1966" from 113 N Broadway, combining touchless laser bays with an Express Exterior Car Wash Tunnel to serve vehicles up to 7 feet tall. The location offers four tunnel packages ranging from the Express wash at $10 to The Works at $20, plus four touchless laser options from $7 to $19, each using proprietary Simoniz and SuperGlo chemistry for protective coatings and shine. Members can choose from unlimited plans like the Unlimited Express Washes at $19.99/month or the Unlimited Ultra Washes at $42.99/month, with touchless-only memberships starting at $20/month.

Beyond the wash itself, ScrubaDub's Satisfaction Center provides free window cleaner, towels, and vacuums, while the 24-hour Touchless Laser Car Wash Bays remain accessible after hours. Customers receive free dog treats, free stickers for kids, and free snacks. The location maintains a 4.6-star rating across 1,069 reviews, with feedback highlighting friendly staff, professional service explanations, and consistently clean facilities. The business backs every wash with a 100% Satisfaction Guarantee.

ScrubaDub Car Wash operates Monday through Saturday from 7:30 AM to 8 PM and Sunday 8 AM to 6 PM. Call ahead or visit in person at 113 N Broadway to choose from tunnel packages, laser bays, or membership plans that fit your routine.

The Royal package ($18 per wash or $32.99/month membership) includes a spot-free rinse, tire shine, and protective wax coating, while the Premium ($16/$29.99/month) adds tire shine to a full exterior wash. phase1.name: Hometown Car Wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Hometown Car Wash in Mogadore, OH operates a touchless automated system paired with self-serve wash bays, open 24 hours every day of the year at 75 N Cleveland Ave. The touchless technology eliminates rim grabbing that can scratch wheels, and customer reviews specifically praise the brushless design for paint protection on modified vehicles. Four wash packages let you choose your level of protection: the Wash package includes foamy presoak and high-pressure rinse; the Clean package adds underbody washing and spot-free drying; the Protect package features a clear coat sealant and spot-free rinse; and the VIP Protect & Shine includes triple foam layers, hot wax, underbody wash, and clear coat sealant for maximum durability.

Beyond standard vehicle washing, Hometown Car Wash operates a self-serve pet wash facility and offers ceramic coating, wax, and spot-free rinse treatments. The location accepts payment through a mobile app (iOS and Android), which unlocks app savings and deals. Monthly Wash Clubs provide unlimited access for regular customers, and the business sells gift cards. Customers report strong water pressure that delivers thorough cleaning, and the facility includes free vacuums for final detailing. For car wash inquiries, call (330)644-2140, or reach the pet care line at (330)819-5242 during your preferred time—the facility is accessible any hour of the day or night.

Jesse's Car Wash on Salina Boulevard in Syracuse operates two Washworld Razor Edge Touch Free washes with HyperFlex technology, eliminating the long lines common at single-bay locations. The Basic package starts at $13 for a touch-free wash with presoak and spot-free rinse, while the VIP option at $21 adds tire shine and ceramic sealant for maximum protection. All four wash tiers—Basic, Deluxe, Works, and VIP—use Diamond Shine chemicals exclusively, and the automatic tire shine feature applies to every wash package. The location at 1600 North Salina Street uses only fresh water, never recycled, and operates open 24/7/365 with camera security throughout the facility.

Beyond the automatic bays, Jesse's offers six vacuum stations with tri-motor units and two standalone shampoo machines, each priced at $2 to $2.50 for six minutes. Self-serve bays start at $5 and include high-pressure soap, rinse, wax, engine and tire cleaner, foaming brush, and air dryers. The Wash Club membership allows up to five washes per month for one flat fee, and the facility accepts cash, cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, coins, quarters, and tokens at touch-screen automatic cashiers. Since 1987, Jesse's has served Syracuse and neighboring suburbs with payment flexibility and no-rush service that customers specifically note in reviews. Call (315) 475-1610 or visit during any hour—the wash is never closed.

A five-year customer noted that the owners maintain the facility well and keep it well-stocked with premium detergents, while another reviewer praised the "very powerful hand held wands" and the quality of the automatic wash.

One weekday visitor was pleasantly surprised by how well the autowash cleaned their cars and appreciated that there was no line, while another customer noted the low cost and good pressure. You can purchase washes or join the rewards program online, or visit the location anytime given the 24/7 schedule.

phase1.name: Buster's Car Wash
phase1.google_subtypes: Car wash, Self service car wash
phase1.description:
Buster's Car Wash is a locally owned and operated express car wash located in Malta, NY at 2409 Route 9, near StoneBreak Road and the roundabout. The business offers four main wash package tiers—Basic ($14 single/$29.99 monthly unlimited), Premium ($17 single/$34.99 monthly unlimited), Ultimate ($20 single/$39.99 monthly unlimited), and Signature ($25 single/$47.99 monthly unlimited)—all featuring wash and dry service. New unlimited plan members receive an introductory offer of $19.99 for the first month, with regular pricing starting the second month.

The facility emphasizes speed, completing car washes in less than 4 minutes, and includes complimentary vacuum use with every wash. Buster's uses a Water Reclaim System and green chemicals as part of their environmental commitment. Additional benefits include a Family Plan for adding multiple members at discounted rates, a 10% discount for military, veterans, and first responders (one car per person), and gift card options. The business operates Monday–Saturday from 8AM–8PM and Sunday 9AM–6PM, with special holiday hours throughout the year.

Members can manage accounts through the Buster's Car Wash membership portal, which also handles gift card purchases and gift memberships. The company is currently hiring and features a customer survey program, along with a fundraising program supporting the local Malta, NY community.

Beyond standard car washing, Pelican offers a comprehensive range of services including oil changes, professional detailing, window tinting, and a full-service mechanic shop. Customers can purchase Quick N' Clean Wash Cards in $50 increments with bonus credit rewards, or opt for other membership options.

phase2.name: Mr. Spotless Car Wash
phase2.description:
Mr. Spotless Car Wash operates three locations in Northern Kentucky: Cold Spring, Crescent Springs, and Newport. They offer three wash package tiers—Basic ($10 single/$23.99 monthly unlimited), Gold ($16 single/$34.99 monthly unlimited), and Platinum ($20 single/$44.99 monthly unlimited)—each featuring soft cloth washing with varying levels of additional services. The Platinum package includes pre-soak, under body wash, rust guard, wheel cleaner, spot free rinse, power dry, ceramic wax, tire shine, tri foam, and lava foam. The Gold package offers pre-soak, soft cloth, wheel cleaner, spot free rinse, power dry, rust guard, hot wax, and under body wash. The Basic package includes pre-soak, soft cloth, wheel cleaner, spot free rinse, and power dry.

The company operates Express Tunnel wash bays open daily from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM at all locations, with unlimited members able to use either location as often as desired. The Cold Spring location additionally offers 24/7 self-serve and automatic tunnel access. Mr. Spotless also provides gift cards for purchase and promotes a "GO UNLIMITED" subscription program for customers seeking regular car maintenance on any budget.

phase2.name: Bart's Car Wash

The facility features two automatic in-bay systems: a touch-free setup using high-pressure oscillating turbo nozzles with dual-arm application, and an IQ system equipped with soft touch brushes and 3D vehicle mapping technology that profiles each vehicle for consistent results. Both bays use laser technology to measure vehicles and offer the Express Wash at $8.00 for quick maintenance cleaning, or the Signature Wash at $15.00, which includes soap, rinse, wax coating, and undercarriage wash. Beyond the automated bays, Bart's provides three self-serve bays outfitted with floor mat hangers, trash cans, and vacuums throughout the lot. The business's tagline is "Wash Smart!" and reflects its membership program starting at $22 per month for unlimited washes through its EverWash plan. With a 4.2-star rating across 134 customer reviews, Bart's combines multiple wash technologies to accommodate different preferences and budgets. Call 574-583-3000 to learn more about membership options or visit the location at 822 W Fisher Street during the 24-hour operating hours.

phase2.name: Quick Clean Car & Pet Wash Store, Ltd.
phase2.description:
Quick Clean Car & Pet Wash Store, Ltd. at 2500 Mayfair Rd in Akron, OH operates 24/7/365 and is the only location in the area offering both Touch Free and Soft Touch automatic wash technology under one roof. The Touch Free wash system accommodates vehicles up to 96 inches wide and 94 inches tall, with a No Touch power dryer system, while the Soft Touch option uses World Class equipment with closed cell foam media technology and includes wheel cleaning capability. During the Soft Touch wash, an LED light show runs through the bay.

Customers consistently report that the strong water pressure effectively removes dirt, and the brushless technology eliminates rim scratches that can occur with traditional brush systems. The undercarriage wash proves particularly valuable during winter months for removing salt buildup. Quick Clean also offers ArmorAll Extreme Shine Wax and Rain-X Complete Surface Protectant as finishing options, plus free vacuums and tire shine service. Self-serve wash bays give customers hands-on control, and self-serve pet wash stations are available for pet grooming needs.

The business maintains a Monthly Wash Club membership program and accepts mobile app payments for convenience. The location holds a 4.6-star rating across 281 customer reviews. For the car wash, call (330) 644-2140, or reach pet care services at (330) 819-5242. Hours remain consistent every day of the week at 24 hours of operation.

# Cache Car Wash Nibley

Cache Car Wash Nibley uses touch-free technology, meaning no brushes contact your vehicle during the wash cycle. The four wash packages—Cache Saver, Cache Classic, Top of Utah, and Cache Bonus—each add specific treatments, with the Cache Bonus tier including carnauba hot wax and an extra rinse cycle. Beyond the automated wash, the location offers self-serve bays equipped with hand dryers, ceramic coating applications, detailing services, and Interior Express Cleaning. Every visit includes free vacuums, and an on-site Pampered Paws Pet Wash facility operates 24/7 for self-serve pet bathing. Members can join the unlimited wash club and manage their membership online through the business's customer portal. Cache Car Wash Nibley is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and maintains a 4.8-star rating.

To schedule a detail service or start a membership, visit the location at 3040 Main St in Nibley, UT 84321, or access the membership portal at cachecarwash.com.

phase2.name: Aqua Tech Car Wash Systems of North Logan, UT
phase2.description: Aqua Tech Car Wash Systems of North Logan, UT operates the only combination wash (soft touch plus touchless) in Cache Valley, using photo eye technology and soft touch brushes designed to avoid scratches. The Express Wash at $12 includes premium soap and spot-free rinse, making it the cheapest loaded-up touchless wash available locally, while the Supreme Wash ($15) adds protective wax coating and undercarriage cleaning. For vehicles requiring extra space, Aqua Tech's RV and bus lane accommodates dually trucks and vehicles up to 8 feet tall with 12 feet of clearance—equipment custom-made for wider and taller vehicles that won't fit standard automatic bays. The Luxury Wash ($15) delivers two complete washes in one visit with wax protection and comes with a money-back guarantee if you're unsatisfied. Beyond automated options, unlimited time self-serve bays cost $8.50 and include free vacuums, spray mist air fresheners, and access to the carpet cleaning station. Monthly wash club memberships start at $18.99 for the Express Wash Club and range up to $34.99 for the Luxury Choice Wash Club—none are tied to a single vehicle. The business, established in 1997, accepts credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay, and mobile app payments at its large accessible parking lot. Call 435-554-3174 or visit 115 E 1800 N to access services available 24 hours on Wednesday and at other times during posted hours.

Customers praise the reasonable pricing, helpful staff, and responsive customer service that keeps this Louisburg car wash a trusted choice in the area.

phase2.name: Scrubby's Car Washes
phase2.description:
Scrubby's Car Wash operates two locations in Bozeman, Montana and has been voted Gallatin's Greatest Car Wash for 4 years in a row. The Touch Free Tunnel location at 1303 N 7th Ave offers an automated touchless express wash and is open Monday-Saturday 8am-6pm and Sunday 9am-5pm. The second location at 1193 N 15th Ave features a combination of services including 4 self-serve bays, a soft touch automatic wash with heated water and floors, and the Scrub Spaw dog wash facility.

The Scrub Spaw is a unique amenity offering pet washing services in a heated room, equipped with dog shampoo, flea and tick treatments, and an air dryer. This location operates year-round at extended hours, open 24/7 during winter and 6am-9pm during other seasons. Both locations provide customer contact forms and phone lines for inquiries, with the self-serve location available at 406.582.9274 and the touch-free tunnel at 406.586.6541.

phase2.name: Kirkland Premier Car Wash
phase2.description:
Kirkland Premier Car Wash in Vancouver, WA operates as "The Pacific Northwest's Premier Self-Serve Brushless Car Wash," offering touchless technology at its location on NE 121st Ave. The facility features self-serve bays equipped with brushless systems and touchless air dry, along with undercarriage wash, ceramic coating, wax, and tire shine services. Three wash packages are available: the Deluxe Wash targets quick cleaning of dirt and grime, the Ultimate Wash adds sealers and coatings for durability, and the Premier Wash provides the top-tier package with all available services. Bundle discounts allow customers to combine any wash packages at reduced prices across multiple locations expanding throughout the Pacific Northwest.

The Vancouver location maintains 24/7 access on Wednesday, accommodating customers who need flexibility outside standard business hours. The brushless system avoids the contact that can mark paint, while the touchless air dry completes the process without hand towels or compressed air gaps that risk spotting. Bundle discounts at each location mean cost savings for customers who choose multiple services. Contact the business directly at its Vancouver address (6106 NE 121st Ave) to confirm current hours for other days of the week or to learn about additional service details.

phase2.name: Links Car Wash
phase2.description:
Links Car Wash operates a location at 10585 State Road 54 in New Port Richey, FL, open daily from 8 AM to 7 PM. The Basic package ($12 single / $22 monthly) includes signature rinse, ultra dry, and wheel cleaner. Basic Plus ($16 single / $28 monthly) adds bug prep and underbody wash. The Premium tier ($22 single / $34 monthly) incorporates triple foam conditioner and tire shine. The Ultimate package ($28 single / $42 monthly unlimited), marked as most popular, adds carnauba wax, rain repellent, and graphene coating. All packages include complimentary self-service amenities: vacuums, mat cleaners, glass cleaner, and microfiber towels.

Additional à la carte services are available for $5 per option, including tire shine, rain repellent, carnauba wax, graphene coating, and pro microfiber towels. The facility emphasizes customer convenience and value, positioning itself as providing cutting-edge facilities with exceptional service. Customers can purchase memberships and single washes online, and the location is accessible via phone at (813) 768-1359.

phase2.name: Mr Sparkle Car Wash
phase2.description:

The facility features a Soft Touch Tunnel Car Wash (open Monday-Friday 7 AM-7 PM, Saturday 7 AM-6 PM, Sunday 8 AM-5 PM) with four service tiers: Platinum ($24 single wash), Gold ($20), Silver ($16), and Bronze ($12). In addition to the soft touch tunnel, the location operates a 24/7 Touchless Car Wash with laser technology offering four automated tiers: Ultimate Laser ($24), Super Laser ($20), Deluxe Laser ($16), and Express Laser ($12). Each touchless option provides touch-free dry technology and various protection treatments. The facility also provides 24/7 self-serve car wash bays equipped with ceramic shield, tire cleaner, pre-soak, bug off, high-pressure soap, foam brush, triple foam conditioner, clear coat protectant, high-pressure rinse, and turbo dry options.

The location offers unlimited monthly membership plans for both the soft touch and touchless services, with promotional pricing available for the first three months. Current promotional rates include Platinum ($29.99/month), Gold ($26.99/month), Silver ($22.99/month), and Bronze ($18.99/month). Additional amenities include 24/7 vacuums and an on-site Valvoline oil change service. Customers can sign up for the email club to receive exclusive discounts and coupons.

Elephant Car Wash at 4300 A St SE in Auburn, WA operates a touchless wash system using a touchless gantry system with high-pressure water and specially formulated detergents that eliminate friction during cleaning. The location is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and features automatic gate access for members equipped with LPR (License Plate Reader) technology and RFID readers. The business offers three distinct service types: Express Wash, Touchless Wash, and Self-Serve bays, along with optional wax and ceramic coating treatments.

Membership flexibility sets this location apart, with options including monthly Club memberships for unlimited washes, annual plans, Family Plan memberships with multi-vehicle discounts, and single wash purchases. Members can pay via Visa, Mastercard, RFID tag, or mobile app with automatic billing. Elephant Car Wash has operated for 75 years serving the Puget Sound area and maintains an eco-friendly operations model across locations in both Washington and Arizona. The Auburn touchless facility completes washes in minutes using its cloth tunnel wash with conveyor and touchless gantry system.

For membership enrollment or service details, visit Elephant Car Wash's website or contact the Auburn location directly during operating hours.

phase2.name: Ride Pride USA Self Car Wash
phase2.description:
Ride Pride USA Self Car Wash in Ogden, UT has operated continuously since 1991, serving northern Utah with three self-serve bays and one automatic bay. All packages feature a touchless brushless system, and the Ultimate and Deluxe packages add undercarriage cleaning and vortex drying for comprehensive care.

The facility is equipped with four bi-motor vacuums and a vending machine stocked with detailing supplies, plus ample open space for drying and detailing work. Ride Pride accepts all major credit cards, Apple Pay, tap-to-pay, quarters, and dollar coins. Located at 3245 Harrison Blvd in Ogden, the wash is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and maintains a 4.0-star rating as a locally owned operation consistently ranked a favorite among self-serve carwashes in the area. phase2.name: Soapy Bucket Car Wash
phase2.description:
Soapy Bucket Car Wash operates two locations in Howell, Michigan: one on Grand River Avenue (across from Planet Fitness) and a newer location on Lawson Drive (in front of the Howell Secretary of State). Both locations are open 24/7 and feature a combination of full-service automated bays and four self-serve bays. The primary wash system uses a specialized in-bay soft cloth approach with a five-brush system, beginning with a two-step pre-soak process that combines high-pH detergent to break down road grime followed by a low-pH solution to enhance shine.

The facility offers multiple wash packages ranging from Express to Ultimate tiers, with premium features including rain-x application, polish, spot-free rinse, high-velocity dry, chrome and glass cleaner, and tire and wheel wash service. A distinctive feature is their use of pure reverse osmosis water rather than reclaimed water, which the company claims provides a streak-free shine without impurities. The facility is well-lit and designed for efficiency.

Soapy Bucket incentivizes customer loyalty through their Wash Club membership program offering unlimited monthly washes for one flat fee, accessible via their mobile app or on-site kiosk. They also offer a buy-4-get-1-free promotion and birthday wash rewards through the app. The Soapy App integrates AirPay technology for quick payment processing and serves as the primary platform for managing memberships and accessing deals.

phase2.name: IQ Car Wash

phase2.name: Purple Elephant Car Wash

Purple Elephant Carwash is a car wash chain operating five locations across Connecticut, including Waterbury (Chase Ave and Meriden Rd), Middletown, Torrington, and Naugatuck. With over 20 years of experience, the business offers a range of services including basic complete washes, express detailing with meticulous interior cleaning from windshield to rims, and a unique Freebie Zone feature available at all five locations. All locations provide always-free vacuums and free towel dry service, along with DIY self-serve washing bays for customers who prefer a hands-on approach.

The company emphasizes savings through its unlimited wash programs and the JUMBO Pass membership plan, which the website claims pays for itself in less than two visits. Their marketing highlights quality, speed, and consistency with a "100% Clean Car Guarantee or Your Dirt Back" promise. The business caters to both commercial and individual customers, offering family plans to help customers save money on regular car wash services.

Customer testimonials highlight the professionalism of staff, fair pricing, quality results, and the damage-free nature of the machines. The business positions itself as the best value option in the area, with emphasis on customer experience captured in their brand phrase "Have an Elephantastic Day." Contact is available via email at purpleelephantcw@outlook.com or at individual locations.

Auto Shine Topsham accepts both credit and debit cards and provides monthly membership options alongside individual wash packages and detailing packages. Call during business hours or visit the 24-hour tunnel at 14 Hamilton Court, Topsham, ME 04086 whenever your vehicle needs service.

extracted_data.company_description: Outback Auto Washes is dedicated to exceeding the community's expectations by providing the highest quality touchless car wash experience for your vehicle. The quality of our washes go beyond making vehicles shiny by offering top notch customer service, monthly wash programs, self serve vacuums, and vending.

phase2.name: Cloud10 SmartWash
phase2.description:
Cloud10 Smartwash in Sewell, NJ (located at 510 Woodbury Glassboro Road) is an innovative car wash facility featuring automatic, drive-thru, and self-serve smart wash options. The facility operates Monday through Saturday from 7:00 am to 8:00 pm and Sunday from 7:00 am to 6:30 pm. They offer four main wash packages: the Fusion Graphene Smartwash ($26.26 single/$48.99 unlimited monthly), Fusion Ceramic Smartwash ($24.38 single/$44.99 unlimited monthly), Ultra 10 Smartwash ($19.70 single/$38.99 unlimited monthly), and 10 Plus Smartwash ($15.94 single/$30.99 unlimited monthly).

Each wash tier includes various protective treatments such as ceramic sealant, graphene coating, hot wax, tire shine, sealer wax, underbody wash, and wheel-brite. The facility provides state-of-the-art vacuums, blowers, and rug/mat cleaners as complimentary amenities. Cloud10 Smartwash emphasizes its SmartWash technology and offers a CLOUDClub membership plan that provides 2 Fusion Graphene washes per month. New customers can claim a free Fusion Graphene smartwash to experience the service.

phase2.name: Bud's Car Wash
phase2.description: Bud's Car Wash operates a touch-free automated system at its Bel Air, MD location on Conowingo Road, available 24 hours a day, seven days a week. The Conowingo Road location includes four touch-free automatics and six self-service bays, with vacuums available for customer use. For customers seeking unlimited washes, the Car Wash Club membership at $35/month includes daily access to the 24-hour touch-free wash. The separate Baltimore Pike location in Bel Air features a soft foam tunnel operating 8 a.m. to 7 p.m., with a Car Club membership at $29/month, plus Dr. Buff Express Auto Detailing services on-site. Bud's Car Wash has been in business for over 30 years and maintains a 4.4-star rating from 233 customer reviews. Self-service bays and truck bays are available at multiple locations, and the business accepts both credit and debit cards. Call 443-829-9150 or visit during 24-hour operating hours at 2112 Conowingo Road, Bel Air, MD 21014.

phase2.name: Gentle Wave Car Wash
phase2.description:
Gentle Wave Car Wash in South Bend, Indiana operates a touchless wash system, the first of its kind in the area, using a low-profile conveyor belt that makes vehicle navigation easier than traditional setups. The facility offers five distinct wash packages—Express, Good, Better, Ultimate, and Touchless—with the Express option completing a wash in approximately five minutes. All washes use biodegradable soaps and soft closed-foam brushes, and customers can add ceramic coatings and waxes to their service. Beyond the wash bay, Gentle Wave provides free self-serve vacuums and a restroom on-site.

The business supports both standard memberships and a dedicated Touchless Membership tier for customers seeking regular service. Mobile pay is available for contactless transactions. With a 4.6-star rating across 109 customer reviews, the operation reflects consistent customer experience. Located at 2123 Cleveland Rd, Gentle Wave Car Wash is open seven days a week from 7am to 7pm. For membership details or to learn more about wash package pricing, call 574-314-5295 or visit during the posted business hours.

amenities.details: Leave vehicle sparkling clean inside and outside

Located at 509 Henry Clay Blvd, this touchless facility includes practical amenities like a car vacuum station and undercarriage wash to handle comprehensive cleaning needs. The business also features a membership program for customers looking to save on regular visits.

With a solid 4.2-star rating from 30 reviews, Magic Car and Pet Wash has earned local trust in the Ashland area. Whether you're stopping by late at night or early morning, the round-the-clock availability means you can fit a car wash into your schedule whenever it works best for you.

phase2.name: Splash n Dash Richmond, KY
phase2.description:
Splash n Dash Richmond, KY offers four distinct washing methods at 214 S Porter Dr: Touch Free Automatic Washing, Soft Touch Automatic Washing, Self Service Bay Washing, and Express Tunnel Washing. The location operates 24 hours on Fridays, accepting both credit and debit cards for all services. The business backs every wash with a 100% satisfaction guarantee and a no-hassle refund policy if expectations aren't met. All equipment and products used are selected specifically to avoid damage to your vehicle, reflecting the business's stated "Safety First" approach.

With a 3.9-star rating, Splash n Dash Richmond provides multiple washing options to match different vehicle needs and preferences. Call 270-865-4743 or visit during Friday's 24-hour operating window to access the service that works best for your car.

unique_selling_points: 100% satisfaction guaranteed with no-hassle refund policy
Safety First - no products or machinery that may damage your car

phase2.name: Soak-N-Suds Car Wash
phase2.description:
Soak-N-Suds Car Wash in Sidney offers convenient 24-hour service seven days a week, making it accessible whenever you need a quick clean. Located at 1612 OH-29, this facility includes several useful amenities for a complete car care experience: free vacuuming, self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on washing, complimentary towels, and undercarriage cleaning to address hard-to-reach areas. The business also features a membership program and an unlimited wash club, which are solid options if you're a frequent visitor.

With a 4.3-star rating based on 26 reviews, Soak-N-Suds has earned a solid reputation among local customers. The combination of round-the-clock availability and multiple service options makes it a practical choice for Sidney residents looking for flexible car washing that fits their schedule.

phase2.name: Offutt Car Wash
phase2.description:
Offutt Car Wash, conveniently located at 103 Union Ln on Offutt AFB, offers 24/7 access for military personnel and base visitors needing quick vehicle maintenance. The facility features self-serve bays that allow you to wash your car on your own schedule, plus complimentary vacuum service to finish the job. With consistent availability throughout the week—open around the clock every single day—you can clean your vehicle whenever it works best for you, whether that's early morning before duty or late evening after hours.

Rated 4.3 out of 5 stars based on 24 customer reviews, Offutt Car Wash has earned solid feedback from the Offutt AFB community. For more details about the facility and current offerings, you can visit their website at offutt55fss.com/auto-hobby/.

Located at 640 Bellview Blvd, this facility uses advanced technology to remove dirt and grime without making contact with your car's surface, making it an ideal choice for drivers who want reliable results without the risk of brush marks or scratches.

With a 4.1-star rating from 21 customer reviews, 5 Star Auto Wash has earned trust from the Fairmont community. Whether you're looking for a quick wash between errands or regular maintenance for your vehicle, the brushless system provides consistent, quality service. Check current hours and pricing online before your visit to plan accordingly.

phase2.name: Super Shine Car Wash
phase2.description: Super Shine Car Wash at 170 Burnham St in Berlin, CT operates 24 hours daily across all seven days, offering both Touch Free Automatic and Soft Touch Automatic wash options. The location features 3 self-service bays and 7 vacuum bays, each equipped with fragrance and shampoo dispensers included. Customers can pay with cash, quarters, or credit card at the automatic and self-serve bays, with cash and quarters accepted in every vacuum bay. The business has earned a 3.6-star rating across 153 customer reviews. With round-the-clock availability and multiple service formats, Super Shine accommodates varied washing preferences—from fully automated options to hands-on self-service work. Check the Discounts and Promotions page at gotshine.com for current offers, or contact the business directly through their website.

phase2.name: Finishline Car Wash
phase2.description:
Finishline Car Wash in Mooresville, NC operates 24 hours daily at 780 N Broad St, offering five distinct service types: Touch-Free Car Wash, Soft Cloth Car Wash, Coin-Operated Car Wash, Self-Serve Car Wash, and Self-Serve Car Vacuuming. The facility maintains a 4.6-star rating across 173 customer reviews. Free vacuums are available around the clock, and vending machines stocked with exterior cleaning products are on-site for convenience.

The business provides two membership options: the Wash Club membership program and Wash Pass package pricing, both designed to reduce per-wash costs for repeat customers. Mobile pay is accepted for all service types. Whether you need a quick touch-free wash or prefer hands-on self-serve options, the 24-hour access means you can clean your vehicle at midnight or dawn without scheduling constraints. Vending machines offer exterior cleaning supplies if you need them during your visit.

Call (704) 799-9533 to ask about current Wash Club membership rates or Wash Pass pricing, or visit during any hour—Finishline is open every day of the week.

phase2.name: Spritz Car Wash & Coin Laundry
phase2.description: Spritz Car Wash & Coin Laundry in Clifton Park, NY operates around the clock with both Touch Free Washing and Soft Touch Tunnel options, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. The facility holds a 4.3-star rating from 204 customer reviews, with users specifically noting the modern, clean facility and immaculate conditions. For ongoing maintenance, the Unlimited Wash Club membership costs $19.99 and includes access to both wash types plus free vacuums at the location. The Spritz Superior Seal treatment and Ceramic Rain Repel add protective coatings available through their service menu, while tire shine rounds out the package options. Payment is flexible through their mobile app, online purchases, or coins for the laundry side. Customer feedback consistently highlights the winter salt-removal capability and describes the unlimited packages as affordable, with one reviewer calling them "a steal." Beyond washing, the 24/7 Self Serve Bays let you handle your own detail work, and the integrated coin laundry expands what you can accomplish in one stop. The staff has earned praise for professionalism across multiple reviews. Call (518) 383-8126 to ask about current promotions, or visit the location at 1588 US-9 anytime—the facility is open 24 hours every day of the week.

phase2.name: Mr Sparkle Car Wash
phase2.description:
Mr. Sparkle Car Wash's Newington, CT location at 25 Pane Rd offers a comprehensive range of automated car washing options to suit different customer preferences and budgets. The facility features three main service types: a Soft Touch Tunnel Car Wash (open Monday-Friday 7 AM-7 PM, Saturday 7 AM-6 PM, Sunday 8 AM-5 PM), a Laser Touchless Car Wash (24/7), and self-serve wash bays (24/7). The touchless laser wash options include four tiers—Express Laser ($12), Deluxe Laser ($16), Super Laser ($20), and Ultimate Laser ($24)—each building on previous features with additions like ceramic shield, wax, and undercarriage protection.

For customers preferring the soft touch tunnel experience, the location offers four unlimited monthly membership tiers: Bronze ($1,899/month promotional rate for first 3 months, then $2,499), Silver ($2,299 promotional, then $2,999), Gold ($2,699 promotional, then $3,499), and Platinum ($2,999 promotional, then $3,999). Single wash prices for these tiers range from $12 to $24. All packages include premium features such as ceramic shield protection, Simoniz hot wax, tire shine, wheel cleaning, undercarriage wash, and high-velocity blow dry. The location also provides self-serve bays equipped with various tools including high-pressure soap, foam brush, ceramic shield, tire cleaner, and turbo dry systems, making it accessible for customers who prefer a do-it-yourself approach.

phase2.name: Fitzy's Car Wash
phase2.description: Fitzy's Car Wash in North Grafton, MA operates a touchless Saber Wash system that runs 24/7, eliminating brush contact during the automated wash cycle. The facility offers four tiered wash packages: the Base Wash includes tire cleaning and spot-free rinse at the entry level, the Premium Wash adds wheel brightening and undercarriage cleaning, the Works Wash incorporates triple foam conditioning and hot wax, and the Works Ceramic Wash tops the lineup with ceramic sealant technology for extended paint protection. phase2.name: Zoom Car Wash
phase2.description:
Zoom Car Wash in Berlin, MD offers fast, automated touchless cleaning with a 150-foot zoom tunnel that washes, buffs, and polishes your vehicle in record time. Located in the Walmart Shopping Center on Route 50—just minutes from Ocean City—this Delmarva favorite serves customers with multiple options to fit any need. Choose from the high-speed automated tunnel, a dedicated touchless bay, or one of three self-serve bays available 24/7 that accommodate cars, RVs, and boats alike.

With a 4.1-star rating from 278 reviews, Zoom Car Wash delivers reliable service at affordable prices. Basic washes start at just $10, and an unlimited monthly membership costs about $1 per day for frequent visitors. Every wash includes complimentary use of their self-serve vacuum stations. Open 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. daily, Zoom Car Wash makes it convenient to keep your vehicle clean without the wait or worry of brush damage.

Open 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. We also offer a touchless car wash bay and have 3 self-serve bays available 24/7 that can even accommodate RVs and boats. Our self-serve vacuum stations are FREE with each car wash. Washes start at just $10 and we offer an unlimited monthly car wash membership for about $1/day with a Zoom Membership. Located in the Walmart Shopping Center on Route 50.

phase2.name: Prístíne Auto Wash
phase2.description:
Pristine Auto Wash in Utica, NY operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week at 1 Arnold Ave, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. The facility offers five distinct service types: Express Wash, Ultimate Wash, Soft Touch Wash, Touch Free/Touchless Wash, and Self-Serve Washing, so you can choose based on your vehicle's needs and your preference. The touchless wash option uses eco-friendly cleaning solutions, and the Soft Touch Wash provides an alternative for those preferring brush contact. Additional amenities include free vacuums and undercarriage cleaning to address dirt accumulation underneath your vehicle.

The Wash Club membership program provides three tiers: the Basic plan at $29/month, the Standard plan at $39/month, and the Premium plan at $49/month, each offering unlimited wash access with an RFID tag for convenience. All major credit cards are accepted for payment, and the business maintains a 4.2-star rating across 221 customer reviews. With self-serve bays available alongside automated options, Pristine Auto Wash accommodates both those seeking a quick automated wash and those who prefer hands-on control. Call ahead or visit during the 24-hour operating hours to explore which service package fits your routine.

Visit Sam's Coin Carwash at 13317 Northline Rd, Southgate, MI 48195 anytime—the location is open 24/7, and you can use either the Touch-Free Automatic system or self-serve bays depending on your preference.

Beyond car washing, H&S Gas supports your complete vehicle maintenance needs with a full-service auto center. It's a practical one-stop option for Nice-area drivers seeking fuel, car care, and groceries.

phase2.name: Spot Free Car Wash
phase2.description: Spot Free Car Wash in Cedar City, UT operates two locations—one at 699 South Main Street and another at 888 West 200 North—both offering touchless, brushless automated washing. The business describes itself as "Supplying your suds! Get your wax on!" and provides both drive-through automatic service and comfortable self-serve bays. The automatic wash includes undercarriage flush, presoak and bug prep, fully-touchless wash and rinse, wax application, and air blower drying. In the self-serve bays, you'll find bug remover, wheel cleaner, bubble brush, wax, and spot-free rinse options. Free amenities include vacuums, air freshener, and towels; carpet shampoo and glass cleaner are also available. The 24-hour access at both locations means you can wash your vehicle any time of day or night. Call (435) 586-1222 to confirm location-specific hours or for other details.

phase2.name: Race Track Car Wash
phase2.description:
Race Track Car Wash and Detail Shop is located in Dover, Delaware at 226 North Dupont Highway, just 2 miles south of Dover Speedway on Route 13. The facility operates as the largest car wash in Delaware and features state-of-the-art equipment. They offer three monthly unlimited wash packages: the Regular Outside Wash at $20/month, the Deluxe Outside Wash at $35/month, and the Extreme Outside Package at $45/month, with single wash pricing also available at $10, $15, and $20 respectively.

In addition to their full-service tunnel car wash, Race Track provides professional detailing services with no job considered too big or small, and operates eight self-serve bays for customer convenience. The business is open Monday through Saturday from 8 AM to 5:30 PM and Sunday from 8 AM to 5 PM. Customers can manage their memberships and order services through their online customer portal. The facility has received positive customer reviews on Facebook, with customers praising their detailing work and consistent quality service.

Beyond basic car washing, Auto Bright provides comprehensive auto detailing services for both interior and exterior vehicle cleaning, with online booking available. phase2.name: E Z Clean Car Wash
phase2.description:
E Z Clean Car Wash, located at 508 TX-107 in Edcouch, TX, offers a convenient touchless washing solution for the local community. phase2.name: OasisTouch-less Car Wash
phase2.description: OasisTouch-less Car Wash in El Paso operates 24 hours on Wednesdays at its location in the Home Depot parking lot at 7411 Remcon, offering three fixed-price packages ranging from $6.00 to $10.00. The $6.00 Complete wash includes undercarriage cleaning, double-pass scrubbing, and spot-free rinse; the $8.00 package adds protective triple foam polish and clear coat sealant; and the $10.00 Premium option includes Rain X water beading treatment. The touchless technology uses an Air Cannon Blower for drying and avoids brush contact with your paint, which customer feedback confirms prevents car damage. A separate vacuum area is available with specialty cleaning products on-site, allowing DIY post-wash work for under $10 total according to customer reports. The business accepts credit cards, debit cards, and cash for payment. OasisTouch-less Car Wash is locally owned and operated as part of a 6-location network throughout El Paso that has served the area for over 8 years, with two lanes available to keep wait times minimal. Tire shining service is offered at this location alongside the core wash packages. Call or visit during the 24-hour Wednesday operation, or check the website to confirm current hours for other days at 7411 Remcon in the Home Depot parking lot.

phase2.name: Grand Wash Express
phase2.description:
Grand Wash is a family-owned express car wash located in Smyrna that specializes in quick 5-minute automated wash experiences. The facility offers multiple wash tiers, including their signature luxury single washes with varying service levels. They pride themselves on using only the softest closed-foam brushes, gentlest biodegradable soaps, and highest quality ceramic coatings and waxes to keep vehicles clean and shining. Notably, Grand Wash offers a true touchless wash option—claimed as the first of its kind in Smyrna—alongside their traditional brush wash services, giving customers flexibility in their wash preferences.

The facility features low-profile conveyor belt technology designed to be easy to maneuver onto, ensuring a safe, quick, and convenient wash experience. All customers have access to FREE self-serve vacuums to complete their vehicle cleaning both inside and outside. Grand Wash emphasizes affordability, great quality, and exceptional service, backed by a 110% satisfaction guarantee. The business also offers membership programs for regular customers seeking unlimited or discounted wash options through their online membership portal.

phase2.name: Shine365 Car Wash

The facility runs 24 hours daily, seven days a week, making it accessible whenever you need to remove road salt or debris without the swirl marks and scratches that traditional brush washes can leave behind. Credit and debit cards are accepted at the location on Hartford Avenue. phase2.name: Zip Car Wash
phase2.description:
# Zip Car Wash, Magna, UT

Zip Car Wash in Magna, UT is the first car wash in Salt Lake County to offer all three wash types at a single location: Self Service (starting at $2), Touch Free Automatic ($5 to $11), and Express Wash Conveyor System ($6 to $14). The locally owned family business has operated continuously since 2004 at 3576 South 8400 West, positioned on the busiest street in Magna across from Arbor Park Shopping Center. The Self Service Wash includes three bays where customers use handheld wands to control cleaning and rinse cycles, with runoff routed through water treatment systems instead of storm drains. The Touch Free Automatic Wash uses high-pressure liquids only, with a gantry on rails passing over the stationary vehicle based on a preselected program chosen at an electronic pay station. The Express Wash Conveyor System (Zip Line Express) completes a full wash in three minutes using a moving tunnel and soft-touch technology.

The facility accommodates quads, motorcycles, and motor homes in addition to standard vehicles, and all bays accept both cash and credit cards. The business operates 24 hours on Wednesdays and provides free vacuums. Zip Car Wash describes itself as "Good Clean Fun Wash in Utah." Call the location directly or visit during open hours to select the wash type that fits your vehicle and preferences.

Super Wash in Monticello, IL offers touchless, brushless automatic car washing at 810 W Bridge St. As America's largest self-serve and touchfree automatic car wash franchise, Super Wash combines decades of expertise with modern technology—the company has been family owned and operated since 1976 and now operates 280 locations nationwide. This Monticello location is rated 3.9 stars based on 66 customer reviews, reflecting consistent quality service.

The touchless system protects your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Beyond the automated wash, Super Wash provides convenient car vacuum amenities to help you finish the job. Whether you're a local looking for regular car care or passing through central Illinois, Super Wash offers a reliable, efficient washing solution that prioritizes both your vehicle's condition and your time.

unique_selling_points: America's largest self-serve and touchfree automatic car wash franchise

phase2.name: Muncie Super Wash
phase2.description:
Muncie Super Wash offers touchless, brushless automated washing at 401 E 26th St in Muncie, IN, available 24 hours a day, seven days a week. As part of America's largest self-serve and touchfree automatic car wash franchise with 280 locations nationwide, you can trust the reliability and quality of equipment and service. The business has been family owned and operated since 1976, bringing nearly five decades of car washing expertise to the community.

In addition to automated touchless washing, Muncie Super Wash provides self-serve bay options for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning. The round-the-clock availability makes it convenient to wash your vehicle whenever it fits your schedule—early morning, late night, or any time in between. With a 3.3-star rating based on 80 customer reviews, Muncie Super Wash is a trusted local choice for vehicle maintenance.

unique_selling_points: Part of America's largest self-serve and touchfree automatic car wash franchise

phase2.name: Splash 24
phase2.description:
Splash Car Wash operates over 60 locations across Connecticut, New York, Massachusetts, and Vermont, offering a comprehensive range of vehicle care services. The company provides multiple wash options including Automated Full Service Washes that use the latest equipment and premium soaps, Express Exterior Wash focusing on exterior cleaning with free self-service vacuums, Hand Wash Services completed in 15 minutes or less with lambswool mitts and interior vacuuming, and Express Detailing completed in 20 minutes or less. For customers seeking premium services, Splash offers Five Star Detailing with nano-technology options like ceramic coatings (Simoniz Diamond Plate) and traditional surface restoration.

Beyond standard car washing, Splash operates 8 locations providing Oil, Lube and Brake Services with a 21-point inspection program, power steering flush, and A/C charging available while you wait without an appointment. The company offers a Splash Unlimited membership program allowing unlimited car washes at any location for one monthly price, plus discounts on additional services. Customers can manage memberships online, book appointments through their website, and shop for products. The headquarters is located in Milford, CT at 472 Wheelers Farms Rd, Suite 201, with phone contact at 203-324-5400.

phase2.name: Easy Clean Car Wash
phase2.description:
Easy Clean Car Wash operates multiple locations across Northwest Indiana, including Griffith, Highland, Lansing, and Schererville. The business offers various wash packages organized by tier level, though specific package details are not outlined on the website. Customers can purchase memberships through the Fast Pass program, family plans, or choose individual wash services. The company accepts modern payment methods including tap payment and Apple Pay at all locations.

The business emphasizes digital convenience with a dedicated mobile app (UWash App) available for Illinois self-serve locations, offering customers one free car wash upon registration and a rewards points system for future visits. Easy Clean also provides gift card options for both online purchase and e-gift delivery, making car wash services a practical gift option. Additional services include a fleet program for commercial customers and self-serve wash bays. Contact is available at 219-922-7900, with an additional mobile app available through their Rinsed platform for Fast Pass management and enrollment.

phase2.name: IQ Car Wash
phase2.description:
IQ Car Wash in Amarillo, Texas operates a touchless and soft-touch automated facility equipped with 3D mapping and 3D profiling technology that adjusts to vehicle size—handling everything from MINI Coopers to dually trucks. The location at 5688 Bell St is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and offers both touch-free automatic and soft-touch automatic wash options, each utilizing the 3D mapping system to customize the wash cycle. The facility includes self-serve bays, free vacuums powered by a Vactech central vac system, a mat cleaner, and high-pressure rotating heads for detailed cleaning. Soft-touch washes use closed-cell foam sponges rather than brushes, and all equipment features auto-start sensing technology.

Payment is flexible at IQ Car Wash, accepting bills, credit cards, debit cards, and mobile app payments, plus the IQ Card value card for members. The business runs eco-friendly operations and has been featured in Car Wash and Detailing Magazine. For a wash, visit during the 24-hour Wednesday hours, or check the mobile app or website at iqcarwash.com for information on other operating days and to set up an IQ Card account.

phase2.name: Zappy's Auto Washes
phase2.description:
Zappy's Auto Washes is a multi-location car wash business offering diverse washing options including Tunnel, Automatic, Touchless, and Self-Serve wash bays. The company provides flexibility in payment methods through their Z-Cards (prepaid wash cards currently discounted at 25% off) and an Unlimited Wash Club membership available for just $10 per month. They also offer gift cards for those looking to give the gift of car care.

Beyond basic car washing, Zappy's operates a comprehensive auto care ecosystem including dedicated Auto Detailing services, an Auto Care Center, Gas Store, and Retail Store. The website indicates they cater to various customer needs with separate product lines for interior and exterior car care, plus special programs like Fleet Accounts for business customers. Customers can book detailed services through their associated auto detailing website, and the company maintains multiple locations with specific pages dedicated to each wash type's locations, suggesting widespread regional availability.

The business provides robust customer support through dedicated pages for refund requests, incident reports, and monthly plan updates. They also offer community engagement through fundraising programs and actively recruit through a careers page, indicating an established and growing operation in the car wash industry.

phase2.name: IQ Car Wash
phase2.description:
IQ Car Wash in Owasso, Oklahoma operates 24 hours daily and uses 3D mapping and 3D profiling technology to automatically adjust wash patterns for vehicles ranging from MINI Coopers to dually trucks. The facility offers both touch-free automatic wash bays with high-pressure rotating heads and soft-touch automatic options using closed-cell foam sponges, alongside ten self-serve bay selections including pre-soak, bug-off, tire scrub, tri-foam clear coat conditioner, and spot-free rinse with hand blow dryers. Their tagline, "SMARTER. CLEANER. GREENER," reflects the operation: SMARTER technology adapts to each vehicle size, CLEANER formulations use premium bio-degradable soaps, and GREENER systems consume less water and energy than traditional methods.

Free vacuums powered by the Vacutech central vac system are available with auto-start sensing technology in a fully covered, well-lit drying area accessible from either side of your vehicle, complete with car mat holders. The location at 8702 N Garnett Rd also provides free towels, tire shine, undercarriage wash, and mat cleaner service. IQ Car Wash accepts cash, credit and debit cards, and value cards, plus offers mobile pay options and membership plans through their mobile app.

With a 4.3-star rating across 638 customer reviews, the business is open around the clock—contact them at their Owasso location or visit anytime during their 24/7 operating hours.

phase2.name: Spruce Street Car Wash
phase2.description:
Spruce Street Car Wash in Elizabethtown, PA operates as a touchless, brushless automated facility open 24 hours daily, accepting both cash and credit card payments. The family-owned business offers three distinct wash packages: the Bronze package includes hot water blasting and spot-free rinse with undercarriage cleaning, the Silver package adds shine protectant and triple foam soap, and the Gold package features a protective wax coating for water beading protection. Beyond automated bays, the location provides two self-serve wash bays and five vacuum stations, plus an undercarriage wash service designed to prevent rust and corrosion from salt deposits and mud.

Customers can join the Monthly Wash Pass Program for unlimited washes with multi-vehicle options available, or pay per wash using mobile pay. The facility includes on-site vending machines and maintains a 4.0-star rating across 181 customer reviews. Spruce Street Car Wash operates one of two family-owned locations in Elizabethtown, both open around the clock year-round. To access the Monthly Wash Pass Program or for specific pricing details, visit the membership enrollment link on their website, or stop by 800 S Spruce St during the hours listed above—which means any time that works for you.

phase2.name: IQ Car Wash
phase2.description:
IQ Car Wash in Blackwell, OK brings advanced touchless technology to your vehicle care routine. Located at 1322 W Doolin Ave, this automated car wash uses 3D mapping and profiling technology with high-pressure rotating heads to deliver a thorough clean without brushes or friction. The system safely handles everything from compact MINI Coopers to full-sized dually trucks and pickup trucks. Premium bio-degradable soaps, closed-cell foam sponges, and auto-start sensing technology work together to minimize water and energy usage while protecting your paint.

Beyond the automated wash, IQ Car Wash offers a full range of amenities including free vacuuming, self-serve bays, tire shine, undercarriage washing, and mat cleaning. The Vacutech central vacuum system ensures powerful cleaning throughout your vehicle's interior. With a 4.1-star rating, customers appreciate the quality and convenience of this facility. Visit today to experience smarter, cleaner car care in Blackwell.
