phase2.name: Panther Car Wash
phase2.description:
# Panther Car Wash

Located at 1133 Rainbow Dr in Derby, Panther Car Wash offers a convenient touchless washing option for locals looking to keep their vehicles clean without the worry of brush marks or potential damage. With a solid 4.2-star rating from 367 customer reviews, the facility has built a solid reputation in the Derby community. They provide self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on control, giving you flexibility depending on your preference and schedule.

For regular customers, Panther Car Wash offers both an unlimited wash club and membership program that make frequent cleanings more affordable than pay-per-wash options. These membership benefits are particularly valuable for Derby residents dealing with the area's weather conditions throughout the year, allowing you to maintain your vehicle's appearance without breaking the bank on repeat visits.

phase2.name: IQ Car Wash
phase2.description:
IQ Car Wash in Valdosta, GA operates 24 hours daily at 1513 Harmon Dr and uses 3D mapping and 3D profiling technology to customize washes for all vehicle sizes. The location offers three distinct wash methods: soft-touch automatic with closed-cell foam sponges, touch-free automatic service, and self-serve bays equipped with high-pressure rotating heads. Every wash includes access to free vacuums powered by the Vacutech central vac system, positioned in a covered and well-lit drying area alongside a car mat cleaner and mat holders.

The equipment runs on auto-start sensing technology, meaning sensors detect your vehicle and initiate the wash automatically. IQ Car Wash accepts the IQ Card value card system alongside bills, credit cards, and debit cards, with mobile pay available through their app. Tire shine is included as part of service. The business holds a 4.7-star rating across 50 customer reviews and operates fleet accounts for commercial customers. To start a wash, visit during any of the 24-hour operating hours at 1513 Harmon Dr, Valdosta, GA 31601, or call to inquire about membership options.

phase2.name: Country Clean Car Wash
phase2.description:
Country Clean Car Wash offers convenient 24-hour service every day of the week at its Uniontown location on Cleveland Ave NW, making it accessible whenever you need a quick wash. The facility caters to a variety of vehicles, including RV and oversized vehicle washing options, so whether you're driving a sedan or need to clean a larger rig, they can accommodate you. Their amenities include an unlimited wash club for frequent visitors, a rewards program to help you save on regular cleanings, and gift cards if you'd like to share the service with others.

With a 3.9-star rating from 48 customer reviews, Country Clean Car Wash has built a solid reputation in the Uniontown community. For more details about their current offerings and to explore membership options, you can visit their website at countrycleancarwash.com.

phase2.name: Festival Car Wash
phase2.description: Festival Car Wash at 1961 La Porte Rd in Waterloo, Iowa operates 24 hours daily using third-generation touchless-automatic equipment and second-generation self-service bay equipment. The management brings 80 years of combined car wash industry experience and has served the Cedar Valley since 2004. An unlimited wash club starting at $14.98 per month, powered by an EverWash partnership, allows customers to wash as frequently as needed without per-visit charges. The facility offers undercarriage cleaning alongside its touchless-automatic and self-service options, with mobile pay available for added convenience. Festival Car Wash maintains exclusive services available only at their locations throughout the region. Open around the clock every day of the week, the Waterloo location accommodates both customers seeking a quick automated wash and those preferring self-serve bay access. Call or visit during any hour to sign up for the unlimited club or pay per wash.

phase2.name: Rain Locker Car Wash
phase2.description:
Rain Locker Car Wash in Gillette, WY offers touchless, brushless washing with multiple options to fit every vehicle and budget. Located at 1307 W 2nd St, this car wash features four distinct wash packages—Ultimate, Deluxe, Economy, and Splash-N-Dash—with the Ultimate package priced at $17 for a single wash. The Ultimate tier includes ceramic coating, wax shine, spot-free rinse, high-pressure wash, presoak, and underbody wash for comprehensive vehicle protection.

The facility combines convenience with quality service, featuring five self-serve bays, advanced dryers for a spotless finish, and free vacuums included with any car wash purchase. Rain Locker also operates self-serve payment systems for quick, hassle-free transactions. Beyond standard washing, the location offers additional amenities including tire shine, ceramic coating services, and a dedicated pet wash station for owners who want to clean their furry companions.

For regular visitors, Rain Locker's Premier Wash Club provides unlimited wash options at $39.95 per month, delivering excellent value for frequent users. Open 24 hours on Wednesdays and maintaining a solid 4.1-star rating, Rain Locker Car Wash delivers reliable service with modern equipment designed to protect your vehicle's finish. For questions or more information, contact the team at 307-689-5908 or jwelnel@hotmail.com.

phase2.name: Blue Line Car Wash
phase2.description: Blue Line Car Wash at 6570 US-180 in Albany, TX operates a touchless laser wash system alongside self-serve bays, allowing customers to choose between automated cleaning or hands-on detailing for cars, trucks, RVs, ATVs, and trailers. The facility accepts credit cards, tokens, and quarters across all wash areas, with self-service vacuums available for quarters only—useful if you're traveling with pets or dealing with muddy interiors. Active gas pumps are on site for added convenience. The business is open 24 hours on Wednesdays and holds a 4.4-star rating. Under the management of local manager Lindsey Presley Vaughn, the facility continues to serve the Albany community with its combination of hands-off laser technology and manual scrubbing options. For specifics on hours on other days or to ask questions, contact Blue Line Car Wash directly through their website at bluelinecarwash.com or stop by the location on US-180.

Ric & Stan's Car Wash operates a 24-hour location at 920 Dix Street in Otsego, Michigan. The facility offers multiple automated wash packages tiered by price and features: the Good package at $10.00 includes hot foam shampoo, high-pressure rinse, spot-free crystal rinse, and turbo blow dry; the Gooder package at $12.00 adds triple foam polish; the Good Golly package at $14.00 features clearcoat sealant, high-velocity side blast, and underbody wash; and the premium Git R Done and Good Golly Wash Plus options include hot wax treatments.

Beyond the automated wash options, the location provides self-serve wash bay access for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning. The business supports membership flexibility through their unlimited wash pass program and customer portal, allowing members to manage their subscriptions or cancel when needed. Additional services include gift card purchases and fleet account options for commercial customers. The facility can be reached at (269) 216-4542 for inquiries.

phase2.name: Warrior Wash
phase2.description:
# Warrior Wash

Warrior Wash offers a convenient touchless car wash experience right on Main Street in Wise, bringing quality vehicle cleaning to the heart of town. The facility features an unlimited wash club for regular customers looking to maintain their vehicles throughout the year, along with self-serve bays for those who prefer more control over the wash process. Beyond standard car washing, Warrior Wash sets itself apart with practical amenities including complimentary vacuum service to finish the job and even a dedicated dog wash station—a helpful addition for pet owners in the area who want to keep their furry companions clean.

With a solid 4.4-star rating from nearly 150 reviews, Warrior Wash has earned trust among Wise residents as a reliable spot for vehicle maintenance. Whether you're looking for a quick wash between errands on Main Street or need a thorough cleaning with vacuum service included, the combination of touchless technology and flexible service options makes it a practical choice for keeping your vehicle looking its best.

phase2.name: Carwash / Wunder Wash
phase2.description: Wunder Wash in Philadelphia operates a 24-hour touchless car wash at 6140 Keystone Street, with one brushless automated bay accepting both cards and cash, plus four self-serve bays that take quarters only. The automated washer is described by customers as powerful and affordable, while the self-serve stalls offer concentrated soap and brush options suited for quick power washing and tire cleaning. With a 4.3-star rating across 303 reviews and no attendant on-site, the wash operates entirely on customer operation—insert cash or cards at the automated bay, or feed quarters into self-serve stations and receive change back in quarters. Call or visit during any hour; the facility is open seven days a week without closing.

phase2.name: Fast Lane Auto Wash

For more information about their specific wash packages and membership details, customers can visit their website at https://fastlanepa.com/510-north-progress-ave.

Located at 896 E National Rd, the facility runs 24/7, so you can wash your car at any hour of the day or night, every day of the week. The wash bays are climate controlled, providing a comfortable environment during your visit. In addition to the automated touchfree system, National Auto Wash offers self-serve bays for those who prefer manual washing. The business has earned a 3.6-star rating across 138 customer reviews. For more details about available wash packages or to ask specific questions, call 937-898-2983 or visit nationalautowash.us.

Call the facility or visit 1390 Conant Street during any hour—the bays are accessible around the clock every day of the week.

phase2.name: Foothills Carwash
phase2.description:
Foothills Carwash operates three distinct service types at their location on 1083 South Main Street: Express Tunnel (Mon-Sat 8am-7pm, Sun 1pm-6pm), Touch Free automated washing (24 hours daily), and Self Serve bays (24 hours daily). The facility offers tiered club pass packages ranging from $20 to $36, each with progressive features. The entry-level $20 package includes Underbody Blast, Wheels Cleaned, and Tire Shine. The mid-tier $28 option adds Foam Bath, Rain-X, Triple Foam Polish, and Clear Coat Protectant. The premium $36 package includes full Wax and Shine treatment along with all previous benefits. Every Express Wash comes with complimentary vacuum service.

The carwash features special promotions throughout the week, including a free wash with any $10+ purchase on Tuesdays and the $18 wash available for $10 on Thursdays. Gift cards and Fleet Policy Passes are available for purchase. The Express Tunnel service includes an LED light show, which has been highlighted as a family-friendly attraction. Customer testimonials praise the quality of results and family appeal. The facility caters to both individual and fleet customers with flexible membership options.

phase2.name: Water Works Car Wash- Arbutus
phase2.description: Water Works Car Wash in Arbutus, located at 3800 Southwestern Boulevard in Baltimore, operates self-serve bays around the clock and offers both touchless laser wash and soft cloth wash options during staffed hours. The facility includes an undercarriage wash, spot-free rinse, touchfree air dryer, wax sealant, and foam polish across its service lineup. Customers consistently note the quality of both the automatic and self-service equipment; one regular noted the self-wash option as reasonable and effective for paint care. Water Works also offers monthly club memberships and partners with K&G auto detailing for comprehensive vehicle care. The location maintains a 4.1-star rating based on 244 customer reviews. Call 410.796.7948 to ask about membership options, or use the self-serve bays available 24 hours every day of the week.

phase2.name: Red Lion Carwash & Laundromat
phase2.description:
Red Lion Carwash & Laundromat offers convenient 24-hour service seven days a week at 240 E Broadway in Red Lion, PA, making it accessible whenever you need a wash. The facility features touchless washing technology alongside practical amenities including free vacuum access, undercarriage wash, tire shine, and wax options. For regular customers, they offer an unlimited wash club membership to help reduce costs on frequent cleanings.

Beyond the car wash, the laundromat component makes this location a one-stop destination for errands in Red Lion. Self-serve bays are available for those who prefer hands-on washing, giving customers flexibility in how they want to clean their vehicles. With consistent 24-hour availability every single day, the carwash accommodates both early risers and late-night visitors without scheduling concerns.

phase2.name: Kwik Trip Car Wash
phase2.description: Kwik Trip Car Wash in Hutchinson offers round-the-clock convenience with 24-hour operation every day of the week, making it an accessible option whenever you need a quick clean. Located at 10 Denver Ave SW, the facility features self-serve bays alongside touchless washing, plus a free vacuum station for interior cleanup. Beyond basic washing, Kwik Trip provides additional services including interior cleaning, detailing, wax application, and undercarriage wash, giving customers options to address different vehicle care needs in one location. With a solid 4.3-star rating from 44 reviews, the car wash has established itself as a reliable choice for Hutchinson residents looking for flexible, accessible vehicle maintenance.

phase2.name: Village Car Wash
phase2.description: Village Car Wash in Louisville operates as a touchless, brushless automated facility open 24 hours every day at 5800 Outer Loop, making it accessible for off-hours cleaning. The location features three automatic wash bays alongside multiple self-service bays and vacuums, accommodating customers who prefer hands-on washing or want to finish with a quick vacuum. The brushless system works well for vehicles that can't safely enter traditional brush-equipped washes, and reviewers noted effective salt removal and spotless windows after using the automatic cycle. Visit during any hour that suits your schedule, or call ahead if you have questions about which bay or payment method works best for your vehicle.

phase2.name: Soap My Ride Car Wash
phase2.description: Soap My Ride Car Wash in Bowling Green, Kentucky operates three distinct wash options: The Lost River Wave Express Tunnel with soft cloth technology, The Touchless Tunnel for touch-free automatic washing, and SMR Spray Bays for self-serve customers. Every wash includes a prep spray at the entrance, hand drying at the exit, and free vacuums. The business also offers ceramic coating, tire shine, towel service, undercarriage wash, and a pet wash option. An unlimited wash club membership is available, currently discounted at 50% off the first two months on all tiers. The three self-serve bays are accessible 24/7, while the express tunnels operate daily from 8 AM to 6 PM. Mobile pay is accepted, and the business maintains a 4.2-star rating across 423 customer reviews. Call (270) 238-6080 during business hours or visit 3156 Nashville Rd to inquire about membership options.

phase2.name: Sven & Ole's Ultimate Carwash/Ole's Oil Can
phase2.description: Sven & Ole's Ultimate Carwash in Roseau, MN operates 24 hours daily and runs a touchless wash system alongside soft touch wash bays and two-car self-serve options. The four named wash packages range from Nora's Express at $11 for a quick exterior rinse to Ole's Ultimate Purple Rain at $20, which includes premium wax coating, undercarriage rinse, and spot-free dry. At the adjoining Ole's Oil Can, customers can get an express oil lube with Mobil 1, plus fluid checks, battery checks, and tire pressure checks without an appointment. The location also provides car vacuums, interior cleaning, and pickup and drop-off service for those who need it. Mobile pay is available, and most visits take around 15 minutes. With a 4.5-star rating across 158 customer reviews, the business is located at 1099 3rd St NW. Call ahead or visit during the consistent 24-hour operating schedule.

phase2.name: Rockhill Car Wash
phase2.description: Rockhill Car Wash in Sellersville, PA operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week at 1105C Old Bethlehem Pike, offering three distinct wash options: Self-Serve bays, a Soft Touch Automatic bay, and a Touch Free Automatic bay. The facility uses a water reclamation and treatment system that recycles water from all bays, part of a green initiative design meant to minimize environmental impact. Members can purchase the Rockhill Loyalty Card, a prepaid card option that provides additional discounts for repeat customers and works across all wash bays. The location also includes car vacuums and undercarriage cleaning services, with an unlimited wash club membership available for those seeking regular visits. Rockhill Car Wash accepts credit cards, loyalty cards, and prepaid wash cards. With a 3.5-star rating from 170 customer reviews, the business is locally owned and operated. To access the automatic bay menus, pricing, or purchase a prepaid card, visit rockhillcarwash.com or use their online storefront.

phase2.name: Fast Lane Auto Wash
phase2.description:
Fast Lane Auto Wash is a convenient touchless car washing option located at 893 Old West Chocolate Ave in Hershey, PA. Open 24 hours every day of the week, the facility caters to both quick visits and late-night cleaning needs for residents and visitors in the area. The business features self-serve bays for those who prefer hands-on washing, along with an unlimited wash club and membership program that offer flexibility for regular customers looking to save on frequent cleanings.

With a solid 4 out of 5-star rating based on 187 customer reviews, Fast Lane Auto Wash has established itself as a reliable choice for car maintenance in Hershey. Whether you need a quick wash before exploring Chocolate World or prefer the convenience of a late-night cleaning session, the round-the-clock availability makes it a practical option for busy schedules.

phase2.name: Caress Car Wash
phase2.description: Caress Car Wash at 3855 N King Avenue in Sylvania, OH operates 24 hours daily and describes itself as "Toledo's Preferred Local Car Wash." This location offers three automated wash options: Touch Free Automatic, Soft Cloth Automatic, and a Combination Wash that uses both methods sequentially. The facility also provides self-serve bays where customers can pay with coin or credit card, plus free vacuums for interior cleaning. According to customer reviews, the self-service bays are noted for being clean and drama-free. Part of a six-location network, the King Avenue site accepts both payment methods at its do-it-yourself stations. Call or visit the location during the 24-hour operating hours to ask about pricing for each wash type.

phase2.name: Niagara Car Wash
phase2.description: Niagara Car Wash in Cicero, NY operates a touch-free automatic wash system that uses a high-pressure system and premium wash products, with four tiered packages starting at the Express Wash for $11.00 and ranging up to the Ultimate Wash at $15.00. The facility is open 24/7 every day of the year, eliminating wait times for wash or dry attendants. All locations feature high-powered vacuum islands with specialty options for shampooing and fragrance, plus a free vacuum service available anytime. The automatic wash bays employ a touch-free system that contours to vehicle shape, while self-serve wash bays are available at the Zimmerly Rd and W 12th St locations for customers who prefer to customize their wash. Every package includes an undercarriage wash and a 2-pass dryer, with additional options like tire shine, air freshener, and mat cleaner depending on the tier selected. Customers consistently report great water pressure and note that the touchless technology is particularly effective at removing winter road salt without leaving soap residue. Payment options include credit card and online purchases. Located at 8030 Brewerton Rd in Cicero, NY, the facility's round-the-clock availability means you can wash your vehicle whenever it works for your schedule.

phase2.name: Easy Clean Car Wash
phase2.description:
Easy Clean Car Wash is a multi-location car wash service operating in Northwest Indiana with facilities in Griffith, Highland, Lansing, and Schererville. The business offers multiple membership and purchasing options including Fast Pass subscriptions, Family Plans, and both physical and e-gift cards available for purchase online. Customers can manage their memberships through a dedicated portal and earn rewards through the UWash App, which offers one free car wash upon registration for users at Illinois self-serve locations.

The company has modernized its payment infrastructure by accepting Tap Payment and Apple Pay at all locations, and provides a mobile app experience through the Rinsed platform. Beyond standard car washing, Easy Clean offers specialized services including a Fleet Program for business customers and maintains specific vehicle restrictions. The business operates from multiple locations and can be reached at 219-922-7900 for inquiries about their various wash tier options and services.

phase2.name: Buffs Wash
phase2.description:
Buffs Wash in Colorado Springs operates a touchless drive-through system at 530 Garden of the Gods Rd that runs 24 hours every day of the week. The location offers four tiered wash packages ranging from the $6 basic wash with presoak and clearcote protection to the $12 premium wash featuring extended soaks, triple foam polish, and lava bath protection for a showroom finish. Beyond the automated system, the Colorado Springs site includes three self-service bays starting at $2 for 3 minutes 45 seconds, where customers control wash cycles using a rotary turn dial and light-blue keypad controls after swiping a credit or debit card at the magnetic strip reader. The facility provides four vacuums at $2 to start, plus amenities including tire shine, undercarriage wash, mat cleaner, and ceramic coating options across its wash tiers.

All four vacuum packages include a spot-free rinse, and the three highest-tier washes incorporate wax coating. Buffs Wash operates three locations across Colorado—Monument, Boulder, and Colorado Springs—and accepts special pricing for commercial fleet accounts. Customers can call ahead or visit during the always-open hours at the Colorado Springs location to inquire about fleet pricing or to start a wash cycle.

phase2.name: Bud's Car Wash
phase2.description:
# Bud's Car Wash, Delta, PA

Bud's Car Wash in Delta, PA operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week at 906 Broad St. Ext, offering a touch-free automatic wash system alongside four self-service bays. The Delta location includes one truck bay with no roof, designed for oversized vehicles. Members of the Car Wash Club can wash 24 hours daily (once per day) for $29 per month and gain access to free vacuums. The facility's touch-free laser wash eliminates brush contact, making it suitable for vehicles with delicate finishes.

phase2.name: Auto Craze Car and Pet Wash

The express tunnel operates Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM to 7:30 PM and Sunday 9:00 AM to 6:30 PM, while the touch-free automatic and self-serve bays are open 24/7. The facility pioneered the nation's first touchless wash as part of a membership program and uses state-of-the-art sensors with expertly adjusted water pressure and pH-balanced products for paint-safe cleaning.

Auto Craze offers four membership tiers for unlimited monthly washing: EXPRESS ($20/month), DELUXE ($26/month), WORKS ($34/month), and EXTREME ($39/month, marked as most popular). Single-wash options are also available at $10, $15, $20, and $25 respectively. Additional services include a commercial fleet wash program designed for Lyft, Uber, and taxi drivers, and a self-serve pet wash station open 7 days a week from 7am-10pm at just $10 for 10 minutes, then $1 per minute thereafter, offering 75% savings versus professional groomers.

All wash purchases include free amenities such as microfiber towels and access to their high-pressure self-serve bays with foaming brushes and premium detergents. Auto Craze also offers VIP Wash Pass gifts with discounts up to 50% off for bulk purchases, suitable for fundraisers, holidays, and employee rewards.

The car wash offers four service tiers ranging from $17 to $45. The Hot Wax Express ($17) includes carnauba hot wax, lava foam bath, bottom blaster with undercoat, and spot-free rinse. The Ceramic Express ($25) adds ceramic protectant and wheel brite to the express wash. The Interior Clean service ($30) combines an express wash with interior vacuuming, window cleaning, dashboard wipedown, and thorough towel drying. The premium Whole Thing ($45) package includes all exterior treatments plus complete interior detailing with fresh scent and a 5-day clean guarantee.

Store amenities include self-serve vacuums at no charge, air pump, ATM, free WiFi, alcohol/beer sales, lottery tickets, and restroom facilities. Diesel fuel is available alongside regular gasoline. Interior cleaning services and tire shine are featured across multiple wash packages, with ceramic protectant and bottom blaster undercoating available on mid-to-premium tiers.

For those who prefer hands-on cleaning, self-serve bays are available, and interior cleaning and detailing services round out their offerings. The unlimited wash club provides a convenient option for regular customers looking to maintain their vehicles throughout the year.

The location also features complimentary vacuum service, making it easy to finish your visit with a thoroughly cleaned vehicle inside and out. Open Wednesdays from 8AM to 7PM, Blue Wave Car Wash serves the Middletown community with a 4.4-star rating. Visit http://bluewavecarwash.com/ for more information about their full service menu and current specials.

phase2.name: Morty's Car Wash
phase2.description:
Morty's Car Wash in South Weber offers a convenient touchless washing option for the local community at 7723 S 2700 E. The facility features several valuable amenities including free vacuum access, an undercarriage wash, tire shine service, and ceramic coating options to help maintain your vehicle. For regular customers, Morty's provides both an unlimited wash club and membership program, allowing you to choose a plan that fits your washing frequency and budget.

Open from 6AM to 10PM on Wednesdays, Morty's Car Wash makes it easy to fit vehicle maintenance into your schedule. Whether you're looking for a quick basic wash or interested in their premium services like ceramic coating, you can learn more about their current offerings and pricing by visiting their website at mortyscarwash.com.

phase2.name: Wash World Car Wash
phase2.google_description:

Our Simpsonville car wash is open 24/7, making it easy to wash your car anytime. For a hands-on self-serve experience, Wash World provides powerful equipment, premium soaps, high-pressure rinse systems, and spotless finish options.

phase2.name: Ultimate Auto Wash
phase2.description:
Ultimate Auto Wash in West Des Moines, IA offers touchless, brushless automated washing technology to protect your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 2033 Grand Ave, the facility features well-maintained equipment in a clean, secure environment. Customers can choose between convenient drive-thru service or self-service wash bays, with vacuum islands available for interior cleaning.

The car wash includes a car care center stocked with supplies you might need, from air fresheners to microfiber towels. With a 3.3-star rating from over 100 customer reviews, Ultimate Auto Wash serves the West Des Moines area including the 50320 zip code. Whether you're looking for a quick automated wash or prefer hands-on self-service options, the facility is designed to accommodate various car cleaning preferences.
phase2.google_description: "Ultimate car wash provides up to date equipment in a well maintained, clean, secure environment for all of your car washing needs. We are located near you in the 50320 zip code. Drive thru or self service options plus vacuum islands. We also provide a car care center in case you forgot an item necessary to clean your vehicle."

phase2.name: Wash World Car Wash
phase2.google_description:
Wash World Car Wash in Taylors, SC offers convenient, affordable, and high-quality car cleaning services. We provide self-service car wash bays designed to safely and effectively clean your vehicle.

Our Taylors car wash is open 24/7, making it easy to wash your car anytime. For a hands-on self-serve experience, Wash World provides powerful equipment, premium soaps, high-pressure rinse systems, and spotless finish options.

phase2.name: Splash Car Wash
phase2.description:
Splash Car Wash operates over 60 locations across Connecticut, New York, Massachusetts, and Vermont, offering a comprehensive range of car care services. The company provides multiple wash tiers including Automated Full Service Wash with latest equipment and finest soaps, Express Exterior Wash focused on exterior cleaning with free self-service vacuums, Hand Wash Services completed in 15 minutes or less with interior vacuuming and dash wiping, and Express Detailing available in 20 minutes or less. All services include window cleaning, towel drying, and attention to dash and door jambs.

Specialized services include Five Star Detailing featuring nano-technology applications like ceramic coatings with Simoniz Diamond Plate protection, Oil Lube and Brake Services available at 8 select locations with 21-point inspections and additional offerings like power steering flushes and A/C charging. The company operates under multiple brand names including Splash 24 and Splash Express locations.

Splash Unlimited membership allows customers to wash their car as often as desired for one monthly price at any location, with additional discounts on other services. The main office headquarters is located at 472 Wheelers Farms Rd, Suite 201, Milford, CT 06461, with phone number 203-324-5400. Online booking, membership management, and appointment scheduling are available through their website.

phase2.name: Bowtie Express Car Wash
phase2.description:
Bowtie Car Wash is a soft-cloth car wash facility serving the Greater Louisville Area, with locations in Lyndon, Fern Creek, St. Matthews, Anchorage, Highview, Norton Commons, and Prospect. The business operates an exterior tunnel wash using soft cloth technology rather than brushes, ensuring a safe wash experience. They also offer hot air touchless dryers to safely dry vehicles and prevent spotting, with the dryers being safe even for convertibles. All vehicles are washed at the same price regardless of size, and professional attendants prepare cars before washing and handle hard-to-reach spots.

Bowtie Car Wash recently introduced unlimited wash packages, with pricing starting at only $11 per month and a promotional offer of buying 1 wash to get the first month free. They also offer a traditional loyalty program with a buy 4 washes, get 1 free deal. The facility provides 100% satisfaction guarantee and prides itself on fast, friendly service. For customers who prefer a DIY approach, covered self-serve bays are available equipped with cleaning products and vacuums, with helpful attendants on-site to assist.

phase2.name: Red Roof Car Wash
phase2.description:
Red Roof Car Wash in Ocean View, NJ offers touchless, brushless automated washing designed to protect your vehicle's paint while delivering a thorough clean. Located at 2518 Shore Rd, the facility operates 24/7, making it convenient to stop by whenever your schedule allows. The wash includes undercarriage cleaning to remove salt and debris that can damage your car's underside.

Beyond the automated wash, Red Roof provides self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on cleaning, plus complimentary vacuum stations and towels to finish the job. With a 3.5-star rating from 28 customer reviews, the business has established itself as a reliable choice for vehicle maintenance in the Ocean View area. Whether you need a quick wash or more detailed service, the combination of technology and amenities makes Red Roof a practical option for local drivers.

phase2.name: J & J Autowash
phase2.description:
J & J Autowash in Metamora, MI offers a safe, brush-free wash that protects your vehicle's finish using advanced touchless technology. Unlike traditional brush washes, our touchless gantry system uses high-pressure water and eco-friendly detergents to deliver a spotless clean without any risk of scratches or damage. With a 4.1-star rating, customers consistently praise our friendly staff and reliable service.

We provide flexible washing options to fit your needs. Choose our automatic wash bays for a quick, hands-free clean, or use our self-service bays if you prefer to wash your vehicle yourself. Long bays are available for trucks and trailers, and complimentary vacuums help you finish the job inside and out. Each bay features convenient tap-to-pay technology, so you won't need to carry cash or coins. The Metamora location at 3539 S Lapeer Rd is open 24 hours on Fridays, making it easy to get a clean whenever it suits your schedule. Whether you're stopping by for a quick wash or tackling a deep clean, J & J Autowash delivers fast, eco-friendly service you can count on.

Whether you're looking for a quick wash or a more thorough clean, the brushless system provides reliable results without the risk of scratches or damage.

Beyond the wash itself, Lucky Duck Auto Wash provides free amenities including vacuum service, wax application, and air freshener to complete your car care visit. Open from 5AM to 11PM on Wednesdays and extending throughout the week, the facility is accessible for early morning or evening cleanups. With a 3.3-star rating, Lucky Duck Auto Wash serves Haltom City and surrounding areas with a straightforward, customer-friendly approach to vehicle maintenance.

phase2.name: American Pride Xpress Car Wash
phase2.description:
American Pride Xpress Car Wash in Smithfield, NC is located at 1203 N. Brightleaf Boulevard and operates as a tunnel car wash facility offering both express washes and unlimited membership options. The facility features state-of-the-art technology and provides multiple wash packages including services like ceramic armor coating, rain repellant, wax application, wheel and tire cleaning, tire shine, and underbody rinse. All tunnel wash packages include complimentary amenities such as mat cleaning (completed in 30 seconds), streak-free glass cleaning, soft towels, high-pressure detailing air for hard-to-reach areas, and free self-serve vacuums with curved claw and crevice tools.

The location is open daily from 7:30 AM to 8:00 PM, seven days a week. American Pride emphasizes their Unlimited Wash Club membership as a primary offering, allowing customers to wash their car daily for one low monthly fee with no long-term commitments and automatic license plate recognition for convenient entry. The company promotes a customer-friendly experience where patrons remain in their vehicle throughout the automated wash and drying process. Specific pricing for individual wash packages was not detailed on the website, but the facility positions itself as offering high-quality washes at affordable prices.

phase2.name: Viking Car Wash
phase2.description:
Viking Car Wash in Reedsburg, WI offers touchless, brushless automated washing available 24/7 at 50 Viking Dr. The facility features multiple wash options including ceramic coating, wax application, tire shine, and undercarriage washing to protect your vehicle's exterior and undercarriage. Free vacuuming is included with every wash, and Viking Car Wash also accommodates RV and oversized vehicle washing with dedicated self-serve bays for customers who prefer hands-on control.

For regular visitors, Viking Car Wash offers an unlimited wash club membership that provides excellent value for frequent customers. Whether you're looking for a quick automated wash or a more comprehensive service package, the 24-hour operation means you can visit on your schedule, day or night. Call (608) 524-6108 for more details about current pricing and membership options.

phase2.name: Splash n Dash Car Wash & Detailing
phase2.description:
Splash N Dash is a full-service car wash located in the Short Pump area of Henrico, VA (9940 Mayland Drive) that operates 24/7 with a comprehensive range of washing and detailing services. The facility features two automated service bays—including a touchless in-bay option with no tracks or chains that accommodates large vehicles like dually trucks, and a soft touch Autec machine with a mitter curtain—alongside five self-serve wash bays and ten vacuum stations (quarters only, $1 for 4 minutes). Automated wash pricing ranges from $10 for a Deluxe Wash to $20 for a Supreme Ceramic Wash, with options featuring undercarriage washing, foam treatments, ceramic finishes, graphene coating, and spot-free rinse systems.

Beyond automated washes, Splash N Dash offers professional detailing packages during staffed hours, including their most popular "Best Wash in Town" service starting at $55 for sedans ($65 for SUVs), which includes pre-scrub, shammy dry, tire shine, and interior vacuuming. Additional detail tiers include Express Wash ($85-$105), Hand Wash and Wax ($105-$125), Interior Detail ($200-$225), and Exterior Detail services. The business also provides innovative membership plans with pickup and delivery service, fleet cards for corporate accounts, gift certificates, and an optional Rain Insurance add-on ($2) that provides complimentary replacement washes if significant rain occurs within 48 hours of purchase.

phase2.name: The St. Marys Car Wash
phase2.description:
The St. Marys Car Wash offers touchless, brushless cleaning technology to protect your vehicle's paint while removing dirt and grime effectively. Located at 107 Fitzsimmons St in St Marys, KS, this automated car wash is open 24 hours a day, seven days a week, making it convenient whenever you need a quick clean. With a 4.4-star rating from 50 customer reviews, the facility has earned trust in the community for consistent results.

In addition to the automated wash options, The St. Marys Car Wash provides free vacuum stations and self-serve bays for customers who prefer a more hands-on approach. Whether you're looking for a fast touchless wash or want to detail your vehicle yourself, this location accommodates both preferences. Round-the-clock availability means you can stop by before work, after hours, or whenever fits your schedule.

extracted_data.tagline: Always Open! Always Clean! Always Friendly Service!

phase2.name: Kirkland Premier Car Wash
phase2.description:
Kirkland Premier Car Wash in Camas, WA operates a touchless, brushless automated system with self-serve bays available 24/7 from 3 AM to midnight daily. The facility uses spot-free rinse technology and touchless air dry to finish vehicles without brushes or contact. Three tiered packages are available: the Deluxe Wash tackles dirt, grime, and road film; the Ultimate Wash adds sealers and coatings for long-lasting shine and durability; and the Premier Wash delivers a luxurious clean with all available options. Beyond the standard packages, Kirkland Premier Car Wash offers ceramic coating, undercarriage washing, wax service, and an unlimited wash club membership option.

The business distinguishes itself by allowing customers to bundle any combination of wash packages at discounted prices. For those who prefer hands-on cleaning, self-serve bays are available. The Camas location at 1829 SE 192nd Ave is part of Kirkland Premier Car Wash's network of multiple locations across the Pacific Northwest. Current customer reviews average 1.8 stars based on 79 ratings, reflecting varied experiences worth reviewing before your visit.

Call Kirkland Premier Car Wash during operating hours—open every day from 3 AM to midnight—or check their website for membership details and current package pricing.
